title: More Vanilla Plus
description: lightweight Vanilla++ modpack that enhances nearly every aspect of Minecraft!
body:
***"_More Vanilla Plus_" is a Vanilla++ Modpack made with _every_ playstyle in mind, this pack upgrades and enhances nearly every corner of Minecraft, even the small things, without losing its charm.***

> **Some things this Modpack adds:**
> - **Complete Visual Overhaul** – Improved lighting, textures, atmospheric and player effects to make your world come alive.
> - **Quality of Life Tweaks** – Subtle improvements that keep things feeling vanilla without breaking immersion.
> - **Expanded World Content** – New structures, mobs, and loot to reward exploration.
> - **Multiplayer-Friendly** – Lightweight and stable for seamless co-op gameplay.

**Faithful to vanilla, Enhanced for the modern player.**
If you love classic Minecraft but wish it had just a little more.. you’ve found the right modpack!

Pack uses the [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) texturepack!
